cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Aditi Rana? Sir, I'm calling from Paytm Mall regarding your recent review about the desert cooler.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes, this is Aditi. What about the review?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, we apologize for the inconvenience you faced, and we want to make it right. We're offering you a coupon, which will be credited directly to your Paytm balance.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, that sounds good. But how will I get the coupon?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Don't worry, Aditi ji, it's very simple. The coupon will be automatically applied to your account, and you can use it on your next purchase.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds great. Thank you so much for your help, sir.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 33s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.
